one_time_description: CMHC special contribution of $2,000,000 recognized as revenue in 2022
economic_notes: First Nation holds equity interests in Aseneskak Casino LP (14.29%), Mahihkan Bus Lines LP (16.67%, going concern noted at partnership level due to COVID-19 travel decline), and Nekote LP (14.29% forestry). Youth centre under construction with RBC loan. Lagoon, school, and water treatment plant capital projects ongoing. Co-management contract in place at $25,000/month.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Nation is in Manitoba (MB), not AB. Six entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from provided text (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Restricted cash totals $1,138,951 (Ottawa Trust $18,593 + New School $169,077 + Lagoon $951,281). CMHC $2,000,000 special contribution is a notable one-time item. First Nations Bank loan covenant violation occurred but lender provided waiver. Mahihkan Bus Lines LP has a going concern uncertainty at the partnership level (not consolidated). Co-management arrangement in place. Assets under construction of $9,917,369 included in TCA. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. OSR calculated as total revenue $18,253,323 minus government transfers $17,653,798 = $599,525.
